summary: Tested new FollowListPage and SearchUsersPage features. All 7 features tested and working: login, search button in profile header, followers/following stat card navigation, followers/following list display with follow buttons, search users page with name/username search, follow/unfollow toggle.

login: Login with naifliver@gmail.com / As11223344 works correctly
Redirects to dashboard after successful login
profile_page: Search button visible in header (top left)
Stats cards displayed: followers (3), following (4), coins (1000), rooms (0)
followers_page: Each follower has avatar, name, username, and follow button
following_page: Following tab shows 4 users being followed
search_users_page: Search button in profile header navigates to /search-users
Search page shows initial state with 'ابحث عن أصدقائك' message
Results show avatar, name, username, and follow button
follow_unfollow: Follow button shows 'متابعة' for non-followed users
Button state updates immediately after click
Follow/unfollow works on search results page
user_navigation: Clicking on user in list navigates to /user/{userId}

routes_verified./profile: Profile page with search button and clickable stat cards
routes_verified./search-users: Search users page with debounced search

critical_code_review_comments: React key prop warning in Badge component - minor issue, doesn't affect functionality
All new pages (FollowListPage, SearchUsersPage) properly use API from environment variable
Debounced search (300ms) implemented correctly in SearchUsersPage
Follow/unfollow state updates locally without page refresh - good UX
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features fully tested: FollowListPage (/follows/:userId?tab=followers|following) and SearchUsersPage (/search-users). Profile page stat cards are clickable and navigate to follows page. Search button in profile header navigates to search page. All follow/unfollow functionality works. User has 3 followers and follows 4 users.
